testsuite.name: com.assetguard.domain.usecase.retention.GetNudgesUseCaseTest

testcase.name: get nudges returns empty list when no context found
get nudges calls engine with correct context
get nudges returns nudges from engine
get nudges returns nudges sorted by priority
